<!-- msg_id: msg-001 -->
Had a productive meeting with the design team today. We agreed on the new dashboard layout and color scheme. Action items: finalize wireframes by Friday, schedule review with stakeholders next week.

<!-- msg_id: msg-002 -->
Finished reading "Designing Data-Intensive Applications" chapter 5 on replication. Key takeaways: leader-based replication is simplest but has failover challenges. Multi-leader and leaderless approaches trade consistency for availability.

<!-- msg_id: msg-003 -->
Went for a 5K run this morning. Pace was 5:30/km which is a personal best. Need to keep up the morning routine — it really helps with focus during the day.

<!-- msg_id: msg-004 -->
Reminder: dentist appointment on March 15th at 2 PM. Need to ask about the night guard for teeth grinding.

<!-- msg_id: msg-005 -->
Project alpha deadline moved to end of Q2. Need to reprioritize the backlog and communicate the timeline change to the client. Set up a sync with PM tomorrow.
